title: View and search complete archive (instead of month-to-month)

posts.author: sugarfarts (Sara Pette)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to be able to view archived items as a whole, instead of having to select the month the item may have been archived. I would also like the archive to be fully searchable.

What are you trying to achieve

To be able to search the archive comprehensively, not just month-to-month.
